title: EPIC: StackKits v1.2 (Oktober 2026)
description: ha-homelab StackKit mit Docker Swarm HA, Enhanced Monitoring, Backup Automation.

title: EPIC: Admin Migration - Integrate old admin patterns into kombify-admin
close_reason: All 8 subtasks complete: dedup, crawlsource, evaluation state machine, retry, n8n workflow

title: Add deduplication fields (normalizedName, canonicalRepoUrl) to Tool schema
description: Add fields for preventing duplicate tool entries during discovery. Fields: normalizedName (lowercase, trimmed), canonicalRepoUrl (normalized repo URL). Add indexes for lookup performance.
close_reason: Added normalizedName, canonicalRepoUrl, evaluationHistory to Tool model

title: Implement deduplication helper functions in scripts/lib/
description: Create deduplication.ts with: normalizeToolName(), normalizeRepoUrl(), generateDeduplicationKey(), findDuplicates(). Follow patterns from old admin tool-discovery-architecture.md.
close_reason: Created deduplication.ts with normalizeToolName, normalizeRepoUrl, findDuplicates

title: Add CrawlSource model with scheduling support
description: New Prisma model for scheduled discovery sources. Fields: name, sourceType, query, scheduleType (manual/interval/cron), scheduleValue, nextRunAt, lastRunAt, isActive, isPaused, consecutiveFailures, maxRetries. Replaces one-shot discovery with continuous automation.
close_reason: Added CrawlSource model with scheduling and health fields

title: Add DiscoveryJobResult model for per-tool tracking
description: Track individual tool outcomes per discovery job. Fields: jobId, toolId, action (created/updated/skipped/failed), toolData JSON, deduplicationKey, errorMessage. Link to DiscoveryJob. Enables granular analysis of discovery runs.
close_reason: Added DiscoveryJobResult model for per-tool tracking

title: Update tool-discover.ts to use CrawlSource and deduplication
description: Refactor tool-discover.ts to: 1) Accept CrawlSource ID or iterate all active sources, 2) Use deduplication helpers before creating tools, 3) Record DiscoveryJobResult for each tool, 4) Update CrawlSource.lastRunAt on completion.

title: Create n8n workflow for scheduled tool discovery
description: n8n workflow that: 1) Runs on cron schedule, 2) Queries active CrawlSources where nextRunAt <= now, 3) Triggers tool-discover.ts for each source, 4) Calculates and updates nextRunAt based on scheduleType. Register in N8nWorkflow table.
close_reason: Created scheduled-discover.ts and n8n workflow template

title: Add evaluation state machine with history tracking
description: Add evaluationHistory JSON field to Tool model. Create scripts/lib/evaluation.ts with: VALID_TRANSITIONS map, validateTransition(), recordTransition(). Enforce state transitions in tool-review.ts. States: DISCOVERED > EVALUATED > APPROVED/DEPRECATED > ARCHIVED.
close_reason: Added EvaluationState enum, state machine fields, and evaluation-service.ts

title: Add retry logic with exponential backoff for discovery jobs
description: Implement retry with exponential backoff (5s, 15s, 45s, 135s). Track consecutiveFailures on CrawlSource. Auto-pause source after 5 consecutive failures. Add notifyAdmin() stub for alerting. Reference old admin tool-discovery-architecture.md section 2.4.
close_reason: Created retry.ts with exponential backoff, integrated into tool-discover

title: Docs: Getting Started Guide

comments.text: Complete: README.md has Quick Start section with CLI-only and kombify Stack workflows

title: Develop modern-homelab StackKit
description: Multi-Node StackKit mit Cluster-Support. Für v1.1 Release Juli 2026.

title: EPIC: API & CLI Hardening (Audit Findings)
CRITICAL: Fix arbitrary filesystem write in generateTFVars handler
description: handleGenerateTFVars accepts outputDir from request body and writes files to arbitrary server paths. Must restrict to temp/sandboxed directories or remove outputDir from API requests entirely.

title: Implement memory check in prepare command
description: checkLocalResources in prepare.go says 'Memory: (check manually)' instead of actually checking. Should use runtime.MemStats or /proc/meminfo on Linux.

title: Adopt internal/errors package across CLI and API
description: Rich error system (271 lines) with categories, severity, auto-fix, and suggestions exists in internal/errors but is unused. Both CLI commands and API handlers use plain fmt.Errorf everywhere. Adopt structured errors for better UX.

title: Implement interactive init command (TUI selection)
description: Running 'stackkit init' without arguments lists StackKits then errors out instead of interactive selection. Add bubbletea or survey-based interactive wizard for StackKit, domain, email, compute tier selection.

title: Replace hardcoded stackKitDirs with directory scan
description: handleListStackKits has hardcoded list of StackKit directories (base-homelab, dev-homelab, modern-homelab, ha-homelab). Adding new StackKits requires a code change. Should auto-discover from filesystem via stackkit.yaml presence.

title: Make CORS origin configurable
description: CORS is hardcoded to wildcard (*). Should accept a config flag/env var for production use.

title: Add pagination to listStackKits endpoint
description: No limit/offset query params on GET /api/v1/stackkits. Fine now but needed at scale.

title: Enforce OpenAPI name regex at runtime
description: OpenAPI spec defines ^[a-z0-9][a-z0-9-]*[a-z0-9]$ for StackKit name but handlers only check for empty string.

title: Handle json.Encode errors in writeJSON
description: server.go writeJSON discards json.NewEncoder(w).Encode() return value. Should log encoding failures.

title: Replace deprecated strings.Title with x/text/cases
description: internal/template/renderer.go uses deprecated strings.Title. Should use golang.org/x/text/cases.Title.

title: Add shell completion subcommand
description: No 'stackkit completion' subcommand for bash/zsh/fish/powershell. Cobra provides this out of the box.

title: CRITICAL: Add API authentication middleware
description: No API key, JWT, or any auth middleware. CORS headers reference X-API-Key/X-User-ID/X-Org-ID but they are never validated. Anyone can use all endpoints if exposed beyond localhost.

title: Unify tfvars output format between CLI and API
description: CLI generates HCL .tfvars while API generates JSON .tfvars.json. Should be consistent (prefer JSON for machine consumption).

title: Expand validatePartial to cover all spec fields
description: handleValidatePartial only validates stackkit, variant, mode, network.mode. Missing: email, domain, nodes, ssh, compute fields.

title: Add build-server target to Makefile
description: Makefile only builds CLI binary, not the server. Need a build-server and build-all target.

title: Fix GetStackKitContainers fallback showing all containers
description: docker client GetStackKitContainers falls back to listing ALL containers if label filter query fails. Should return empty list instead of non-StackKit containers.

title: CRITICAL: Fix compute tier enum mismatch in OpenAPI spec
description: OpenAPI spec says minimal/standard/performance but code validates low/standard/high. TD-04 fixed Go code but OpenAPI spec was not updated. Clients using the spec send invalid values.

title: Add rate limiting middleware to API server
description: No rate limiting on any endpoint. Generation endpoints could be expensive. Add configurable rate limiter (e.g. per-IP or per-API-key).

title: Add API server handler tests
description: Zero test coverage for internal/api/ (server.go, handlers.go). Need unit tests for all 13 handlers, middleware chain, error responses, and edge cases.

title: Fix logging middleware to capture response status code
description: loggingMiddleware doesn't wrap http.ResponseWriter so it cannot capture the HTTP status code. Needs a ResponseWriter wrapper to record status for structured logs.

title: Implement --json output for status command
description: The --json flag is declared on the status command but JSON output is not implemented. Output is always human-formatted table.

title: Wire template Renderer into CLI generate command
description: CLI generate command's copyOrRenderTemplates calls copyFile instead of executing Go templates via internal/template/Renderer. Templates are copied verbatim, not rendered with variable substitution.

title: Wire iac.Executor and terramate packages into CLI
description: internal/iac/ and internal/terramate/ are complete implementations (~850 lines, tested) but the CLI directly uses internal/tofu/. The unified iac.Executor interface is dead code. Wire it in so Terramate mode works from CLI.

title: Docs: CLI Reference
description: Vollständige CLI Kommando-Referenz: init, validate, plan, apply, destroy, status. Mit Beispielen.

comments.text: Complete: docs/CLI.md exists with full command reference. Added missing --non-interactive flag.

title: EPIC: kombify-admin Platform Expansion (v4 Architecture)

comments.author: Soulcreek
comments.text: Platform expansion based on Websearch-UI pattern: Discover → Evaluate → Manage → Automate. Prisma schema expanded with 8 new enums, 7 new models. Seed data updated to v4. Discovery scripts created. CUE generators expanded for Add-Ons, Contexts, Tool Catalog. docker-compose now includes n8n. See kombify-admin/ for all changes.

title: Run Prisma migration for expanded admin schema

comments.author: Soulcreek
comments.text: Completed: PostgreSQL running on port 5434, schema pushed with prisma db push, database seeded (14 tools, 4 stackkits, 14 tool associations, 9 validation rules, 12 settings, 3 patterns, 4 decisions, 3 context defaults, 7 add-ons, 6 categories, 5 n8n workflows). Fixed seed.ts to handle nullable variantName in compound unique constraint using findFirst+create pattern. CUE generation verified working (5 files generated in base/generated/). Fixed generate-cue.ts path resolution for ESM compatibility.

title: Configure Firecrawl API key and test tool discovery pipeline
close_reason: Created tsconfig, .env.example, added CrawlSource seed data, tested discovery pipelines - both work

title: Set up n8n workflows for automated tool scanning
close_reason: Created n8n README, added tool-enrichment workflow, updated tool-enrich.ts with batch mode support for automation.

title: Build admin UI for tool evaluation dashboard

comments.author: Soulcreek
comments.text: Built server-rendered admin dashboard (scripts/dashboard.ts). Zero extra dependencies - uses Node built-in http module + Prisma. Pages: /, /tools, /tools/:id, /addons, /contexts, /evaluations. Dark theme, filter by state/category. Run via npm run dashboard on port 3400.

title: Integrate generated CUE files into base/ validation pipeline

All 5 generated files (validation_rules.cue, settings_metadata.cue, addons.cue, contexts.cue, tool_catalog.cue) pass cue vet validation. All stackkits (base-homelab, dev-homelab, modern-homelab, ha-homelab) validate successfully with the new definitions.
